descriptors.e: Values personal connections and in-person engagement

descriptors.d: Focuses on consumer feedback over experts
descriptors.e: Emphasizes storytelling as a sales tool
Visits stores directly to pitch products

descriptors.d: Relies on media coverage for exposure
Sees shoes as more than just products
descriptors.e: Highlights storytelling as a core value

factual_points: Visited American Rag store to pitch TOMS in person
Story gained media coverage in Los Angeles Times
Received 900 orders initially, then 2,200 after article
Had only 160 pairs of shoes left after surge
Relied on Craigslist to fulfill orders quickly
Believed personal engagement beats remote communication
caution_flags: Media framing may emphasize storytelling over product quality
Focus on personal connection may overlook scalability
Rapid demand surge risks inventory shortages
Media coverage could inflate perceived success
title: How I Did It: The TOMS Story
